docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,300.00 FILED BY LAU, GINA LAU, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT SCHAFER, ADAM GILLETTE, KATHRN HANES, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT (2) WERE PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT KATHRN GILLETTE WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, GINA LAU, JEFFREY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHAFER, ADAM GILLETTE, KATHRN HANES, FRANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
